title: Standard shipping time
text: Standard shipping at ShopEasy takes 3 to 5 business days within the United States. Orders are processed within 24 hours on business days. You will receive a tracking number by email once your order ships.

title: Express and international shipping
text: Express shipping delivers in 1 to 2 business days for an extra 12 dollars. International shipping is available to over 40 countries and takes 7 to 14 business days depending on customs in the destination country.

title: Free shipping threshold
text: Orders over 50 dollars qualify for free standard shipping. The discount is applied automatically at checkout when your cart subtotal exceeds the threshold.

title: Return window and policy
text: ShopEasy accepts returns within 30 days of delivery. Items must be unused and in their original packaging. To start a return, go to your account orders page and click Request Return.

title: Refund processing time
text: Once we receive your returned item, refunds are processed within 5 to 7 business days back to your original payment method. You will get an email confirmation when the refund is issued.

title: Non-returnable items
text: Final-sale items, gift cards, and personalized products cannot be returned or refunded. Perishable goods and opened software are also non-returnable for hygiene and licensing reasons.

title: Accepted payment methods
text: We accept Visa, Mastercard, American Express, PayPal, and Apple Pay. Payment is charged at the time the order is placed. We do not accept cash on delivery.

title: Installments and financing
text: ShopEasy offers buy-now-pay-later through Klarna for orders above 75 dollars, letting you split the cost into four interest-free payments over six weeks.

title: Warranty coverage
text: Electronics come with a 12-month manufacturer warranty covering hardware defects. The warranty does not cover accidental damage, water damage, or normal wear and tear.

title: How to claim warranty
text: To claim a warranty, contact support with your order number and a description of the defect. Approved claims are repaired or replaced free of charge within 10 business days.

title: Creating an account
text: You can create a ShopEasy account with your email address, or sign in with Google. An account lets you track orders, save addresses, and view your purchase history.

title: Resetting your password
text: If you forgot your password, click Forgot Password on the login page and enter your email. We will send a reset link that is valid for one hour.

title: Deleting your account
text: To delete your account, go to account settings and choose Delete Account. This permanently removes your data within 30 days in line with our privacy policy.

title: Discount codes
text: Enter discount codes in the promo field at checkout. Only one promo code can be used per order, and codes cannot be combined with clearance pricing.

title: Loyalty rewards program
text: ShopEasy Rewards gives you one point for every dollar spent. 100 points equal a 5 dollar voucher. Points expire 12 months after they are earned.

title: Contacting customer support
text: Customer support is available by live chat from 9 AM to 9 PM Eastern Time, and by email at support@shopeasy.example any time. Average email response time is under 6 hours.

title: Order cancellation
text: You can cancel an order for free within one hour of placing it from the orders page. After that, the order may have already shipped and must be handled as a return.

title: Product availability and restock
text: If an item is out of stock, you can click Notify Me to get an email when it is restocked. Popular items are typically restocked within two weeks.

title: Price match guarantee
text: ShopEasy matches the price if you find the identical item cheaper at a major competitor within 14 days of purchase. Submit the competitor link to support to request a price match.

title: Data privacy
text: We never sell your personal data. Payment details are encrypted and processed by certified third-party providers. You can request a copy of your stored data from account settings.
